title: IntegrationProviderDef - Metadata API
description: Represents an integration definition associated with a service process. Stores data for the Industries: Send Apex Async Request and Industries: Send External Async Request invocable actions.

active.description: Specifies whether this Integration Definition is active. The default is false.

apexClass.description: The custom Apex class that the related Industries: Send Apex Async Request invocable action invokes. Specify either apexClass or fileBasedApexClass but not both. Applies only if the type is Apex.

description.description: A meaningful explanation of the Integration Definition.

developerName.description: A system name for the Integration Definition.

externalServiceOperationName.description: The external service operation that the related Industries: Send External Async Request invocable action invokes. Applies only if the type is LowCode.

externalServiceRegistration.description: The external service that the related Industries: Send External Async Request invocable action invokes. Applies only if the type is LowCode.

fileBasedApexClass.description: The Salesforce-provided Apex class that the related Industries: Send Apex Async Request invocable action invokes. Specify either apexClass or fileBasedApexClass but not both. Applies only if the type is Apex.

fileBasedExternalService.description: The Salesforce-provided external service that the Integration Definition invokes. This field is used for packaged or system-provided external service integrations. Applies only if the type is LowCode. Available in API version 64.0 and later.

fileBasedInputDataProcessor.description: The Salesforce-provided Integration Procedure that processes the specified data. This field references packaged or system-provided data processors. Applies only if the type is LowCode. Available in API version 64.0 and later.

fileBasedOmniUiCard.description: The Salesforce-provided OmniStudio UI Card that's associated with this Integration Definition. This enables packaged UI components for integration configuration. Available in API version 64.0 and later.

fileBasedOutputDataProcessor.description: The Salesforce-provided Integration Procedure that processes the returned data. This field references packaged or system-provided output processors. Applies only if the type is LowCode. Available in API version 64.0 and later.

inputDataProcessor.description: The optional Integration Procedure that processes the sent data. Applies only if the type is LowCode.

integrationProviderAttributes.description: Custom attributes that store data associated with an Integration Definition.

javaClassName.description: Name of the Java class that the Integration Definition invokes. Applies only if the type is Java. Available in API version 59.0 and later.

outputDataProcessor.description: The optional Integration Procedure that processes the returned data. Applies only if the type is LowCode.

providerLabel.description: A meaningful name for the Integration Definition.

type.description: What the Integration Definition calls, either an Apex class or an external service.Values are: Apex Java LowCode

dataType.description: The data type of the attribute.Values are: Date DateTime Double Integer Percentage String Boolean

dateTimeValue.description: The value of the attribute if the dataType is DateTime.

dateValue.description: The value of the attribute if the dataType is Date.

description.description: A meaningful explanation of the attribute.

developerName.description: A system name for the attribute.

doubleValue.description: The value of the attribute if the dataType is Double.

integerValue.description: The value of the attribute if the dataType is Integer.

label.description: A meaningful name for the attribute.

percentageValue.description: The value of the attribute if the dataType is Percentage.

required.description: Specifies whether the attribute is required.

stringValue.description: The value of the attribute if the dataType is String.

trueOrFalseValue.description: The value of the attribute if the dataType is Boolean.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of an IntegrationProviderDef component.
